situation: MONI-PY-003 (audit-2026-07-07-029): /validation/grid-search endpoint called wfo_engine.run_wfo() synchronously on FastAPI async event loop, blocking all concurrent requests during grid search (medium severity DoS vector). Derived fix from deep audit.
action: Refactored run_grid_search to use AsyncRunStore.start('grid-search', _target) matching existing /wfo/run pattern. Endpoint now returns {run_id, kind, status} immediately; client polls /wfo/run/{run_id} for progress/result. WFO engine runs in background thread via run_store.
outcome_evidence: Commit ca76452 on auto/opt-local_simulator-1783352870 (pushed to origin d4fc660..ca76452). 1 file changed, 21 insertions(+), 18 deletions(-). cp-guard triggered (diverged wt), used case-104 direct-edit-wt escape hatch.
next_suggestion: 派生 MONI-PY-004 (M, agent action whitelist bypass api.py:1375) → 同 worktree opt-local_simulator-1783352870 追加修复；完成后 audit-cycle-state pending_count=0 → cycle-complete → 触发下一轮全量审计

audit_findings.finding: Synchronous wfo_engine.run_wfo() blocks FastAPI async event loop in /validation/grid-search (MONI-PY-003)
audit_findings.remediation: Offload to AsyncRunStore.start() with kind='grid-search', return run_id for polling
